headline: IBM Rallies 8% While Oracle, Cisco, HPE Drift: Is the Laggard Finally Bouncing?
summary: Shares of International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) are up 8% in mid-morning trading Thursday, while three legacy enterprise tech peers don’t have the same rocket fuel today. Oracle (NYSE:ORCL), Cisco Systems (NASDAQ:CSCO), and Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) are providing mixed results and falling behind IBM stock. The setup is striking because IBM stock has been the ... IBM Rallies 8% While Oracle, Cisco, HPE Drift: Is the Laggard Finally Bouncing?

headline: HPE to Present Live Webcast of Investor Relations Summit at HPE Discover 2026
summary: HOUSTON, May 21, 2026--HPE (NYSE: HPE) will conduct a live audio webcast of the Investor Relations Summit at HPE Discover 2026 on June 16, 2026. HPE also invites investors to view additional live programming from the event, including HPE president and CEO Antonio Neri’s keynote address.

headline: Taiwan Seeks to Detain Three in Nvidia Smuggling Crackdown
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Taiwanese officials are seeking to detain three individuals for forging documents in order to export Nvidia Corp.
